name: SDR Hit List
description: Hand each SDR a ranked list of exactly which accounts to work this week, and why — with DM gaps and newly-activated accounts flagged.
alsoSurfaces: Which 30 accounts should this SDR contact this week?
Where are decision-maker gaps that we should fill?
Which accounts just activated and should get an early call?
What's the last-touch state for each priority account?
beforeWeRun: SDR scope — single rep, pod, or all SDRs?
List size — top 20, 30, or 50 per rep?

whatYoullGet.name: Per-SDR ranked list
whatYoullGet.desc: Top accounts for each rep with reason-to-call and last-touch.

whatYoullGet.name: DM gap flags
whatYoullGet.desc: Accounts where the decision-maker has not been reached.

whatYoullGet.name: Newly-activated list
whatYoullGet.desc: Accounts that just hit intent thresholds this week.

whatYoullGet.name: Last-touch ages
whatYoullGet.desc: How stale outreach has gotten on each priority account.

whatYoullGet.name: Pod totals
whatYoullGet.desc: Aggregated work-list size and gap count by pod.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your SDR work list in ~8 min.
